title: Dude Ranch
writer: Milton Krims, Percy Heath, Grover Jones
actors: Jack Oakie, Stuart Erwin, Eugene Pallette
plot: Chester Carr, owner of a dude ranch in the Rockies, caters to guests seeking the thrill of the Wild West. Among his guests are the wealthy Spruce Meadows and his daughter Susan. But the West isn't wild anymore and most of Carr's g...
